medium.title: Build a Button System with Border Effects
medium.description: Create 3 buttons with different border styles that animate on hover: an outlined button that fills on hover, a ghost button where border appears on hover, and an underlined button with animated bottom border.
medium.starterCode:
<button class="btn outlined">Outlined</button>
<button class="btn ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn underlined">Underlined</button>

<style>
  /* Style each button type with border hover effects */
</style>
medium.solution:
<button class="btn outlined">Outlined</button>
<button class="btn ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn underlined">Underlined</button>

<style>
body { padding: 40px; font-family: Arial; }
.btn { background: none; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; margin: 10px; transition: all 0.3s; }
.outlined { border: 2px solid #4299e1; color: #4299e1; border-radius: 5px; }
.outlined:hover { background: #4299e1; color: white; }
.ghost { border: 2px solid transparent; color: #333; border-radius: 5px; }
.ghost:hover { border-color: #333; }
.underlined { border: none; color: #e53e3e; border-bottom: 2px solid #e53e3e; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 0; }
.underlined:hover { border-bottom-width: 4px; }
</style>

hard.title: Build a Profile Card with Custom Shapes
hard.description: Create a profile card featuring a circular avatar using border-radius: 50%, a pill-shaped badge, and a top accent border. Use box-sizing: border-box to ensure borders don't break the layout.
